headline: Broadcom Enters Earnings As Citi's Top Semiconductor Pick
summary: The question surrounding Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) heading into its next earnings report is not whether the company belongs among the AI trade’s biggest winners. That debate ended a long time ago. The more pressing question is whether a business already generating tens of billions in AI-related revenue can keep growing fast enough to justify a valuation that has briefly crossed $2 trillion. Citi’s answer, for now, is yes. Analyst Atif Malik raised his price target on the stock from $475 to $500 on

headline: How The Investment Narrative For Abbott Laboratories (ABT) Is Shifting With Recent Analyst Resets
summary: Abbott Laboratories is under fresh scrutiny as price targets are reset, with some analysts trimming their expectations and others keeping fair value estimates such as US$118.64 broadly intact. The more cautious tone in recent research, including cuts to targets and removal from a key US conviction list, sits alongside ongoing supportive views that still see room for upside versus analysts’ own fair value work. headline: How The RLX Technology (RLX) Story Is Shifting As Margins Temper The Valuation Upside
summary: RLX Technology is back in focus after analysts refreshed their models and set an updated Street price target of US$2.50, compared with a fair value estimate of about US$3.14. This adjustment reflects a shift in emphasis within recent research, where analysts are weighing revenue assumptions against a more cautious view on profitability and execution risk. As you read on, you will see how these changing targets feed into the evolving story around RLX Technology and what it could mean for your...
